Date
1 Project Overview

Hard Deadline
Shoot Date(s)
Delivery Date
Project Description (one paragraph)
2 Target Audience
Primary Audience
Age Range / Demographics
Audience Context (where/how will they see this?)
3 Goals & Emotion

Success Looks Like…

Must-Have Elements

Payment Terms
Additional Notes / Special Instructions
